steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: For no solution, line $k$ must be parallel to line $h$ but not identical. Use two readable points from $h$, $(0,-8)$ and $(1,-18)$, and fit $sx+40y=t$ directly in Desmos with $x_1=[0,1]$, $y_1=[-8,-18]$, and $s x_1+40y_1\sim t$.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content: Desmos gives the identical-line value $t=-320$. That value makes line $k$ the same as $h$, giving infinitely many solutions rather than no solution. Any different listed $t$ would make a distinct parallel line. Therefore the value that is not possible is choice D.
